text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow, Flash, you made an Umatter<n>account?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your recommendation, yes.<n>You said it
was vital to my life as an<n>Umamusume, and a
service I owe to my<n>fans, correct?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Our fans are always cheering us<n>on, so we
should give them a little cheer<n>through our posts
too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So what're you posting about anyway?<n>Let me
see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
12:30 Beginning lunch. Status: On<n>schedule.
14:40 Beginning independent<n>training.  Status:
On schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've also discovered that Umatter posts<n>are an
excellent way to maintain my<n>schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Although it does annoy me when the<n>post's
timestamp is a few seconds off<n>from the moment I
intended.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Y-your Umatter looks like an itinerary...
